objective: Single-page topology UI on localhost:19090. Read-only. Visualizes current mesh state, polls REST endpoint, NO spawn buttons yet.
in_scope: topology-ui/ binary — axum server on :19090 + axum-otlp instrumentation
Joins mesh as view-only participant on ALPN rafka-topology-v1
Serves single-page HTML+JS (vis-network for graph; no SPA framework)
GET /api/topology returns current peer list (gateway-side cache populated from peer.discovered events)
WebSocket /ws/topology pushes deltas on peer arrival/departure
exit_criteria: Browser http://localhost:19090 shows 4 nodes + edges between pairs
Kill one node externally → graph updates within 10s without page refresh
All UI HTTP requests instrumented with spans (rafka.ui.http.request)
Jaeger URL covering rafka-topology-ui service traces
